author: Kuestenlogik
name: Surgewave Storage Engine Plugin
description: A Surgewave storage-engine plugin scaffold (IStorageEnginePlugin) with manifest, stub class and a passing xUnit test.

PluginId.description: Reverse-DNS unique plugin id (matches the v1 manifest schema pattern).

FeatureId.description: Feature id reported by the IPlugin contract.

EngineName.description: Configuration value for Surgewave:Storage:Engine that selects this engine.
